[2018-03-10 23:37] .jrkirby (jrkirby): Flagstone

Cost: 4GG
16 HP Defender, Fragile
As an additional cost to producing Flagstone, consume 2 (non-prompt) forcefields.
4 Supply

---

This should be the most efficient soak in the game, about 10% to 20% more efficient than aegis in inflation adjusted cost. That should make up for the fact that it's horrendously clunky and will often leave you over or underteched on the turns around it's building, it's extremely difficult to get your full absorb with, it needs to be planned 2 turns sooner than traditional prompt defenses, and it's telegraphed pretty obviously by building two non-absorbing forcefields, so it can be played around.

It would make a pretty clear hard-counter to wincer. It might answer endotherm kit, or other large freeze plays. It might be able to soak in extremely high econ games without losing absorb, or maybe even every other turn. It could be a way to use up drones before going breachproof. Or it could be the sole defender in green-red sets where there is almost no good absorb anyway.

[2018-03-12 21:52] http404error: I'm not the most happy that it does nothing once your Nitros are gone and just clogs the board
[2018-03-12 21:53] http404error: But I like that it does three cool things that might be good in different situations
[2018-03-12 21:53] redzonex (Redzone): I think this varies greatly in power depending on whether Cybes are in the random set or not
[2018-03-12 21:53] http404error: That's true - most consumptive units use base set fuel
[2018-03-12 21:53] http404error: Maybe I should rework it to use Engis or something
[2018-03-12 21:54] http404error: But I think it's okay that a 2-unit combo can change the usage greatly
[2018-03-12 21:54] http404error: As long as it's not auto-buy with or unbuyable without
[2018-03-12 21:54] redzonex (Redzone): This is not weak with Cybes in the set for sure
[2018-03-12 21:54] http404error: I think it might be unbalanced but I don't think it's super weak even alone
[2018-03-12 21:54] redzonex (Redzone): The worst use case is you get 5 husks
[2018-03-12 21:54] http404error: It's comparable to Grenade Mech, for instance
[2018-03-12 21:55] http404error: I actually designed it with Husks at first
[2018-03-12 21:55] http404error: Coming with a 6th Cybe and raising the cost might help
[2018-03-12 21:55] redzonex (Redzone): The best use case with Cybes not in the set is that you get 2 attack per turn over 5 turns
[2018-03-12 21:55] redzonex (Redzone): Neither of those seem like they're worth 15RRR
[2018-03-12 21:55] http404error: I thought the value would be in the flexibility
[2018-03-12 21:56] http404error: It's easy to change the cost though
[2018-03-12 21:56] http404error: It's the design that is the important part
[2018-03-12 21:56] redzonex (Redzone): I mean consider Doomed Mech
[2018-03-12 21:56] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): 2 Stamina attack, 3 Soak.
[2018-03-12 21:56] http404error: That's a better comparison, I like that
[2018-03-12 21:57] http404error: I thought it was good that you could push 6 damage in burst too though
[2018-03-12 21:57] redzonex (Redzone): That gives you 2 attack per turn for 4 turns and soaks 5, and it can also be an absorber
[2018-03-12 21:57] http404error: It can't absorb, it's not a Blocker
[2018-03-12 21:57] http404error: I thought about making it one though
[2018-03-12 21:57] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Needs Nitroc to be good.
[2018-03-12 21:57] redzonex (Redzone): I was talking about Dmech lol
[2018-03-12 21:58] redzonex (Redzone): The burst case is something I hadn't considered, but there are comparable units that put out similar pressure repeatedly
[2018-03-12 21:58] redzonex (Redzone): Plasmafier, Vai and Tatsu all kinda qualify
[2018-03-12 21:59] http404error: Yeah, the cost and numbers are easy to change, the hard part is getting it so that each use case is close to the same utility
[2018-03-12 21:59] redzonex (Redzone): Maybe I buy this at 12RRR
[2018-03-12 21:59] http404error: XRR is also a costing option
[2018-03-12 21:59] redzonex (Redzone): That might be kind of degenerate with the burst case
[2018-03-12 21:59] http404error: I also thought about making a Blue one that consumes Pixies to make Walls or something
[2018-03-12 21:59] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): 12GRR, but Burst is strong.

[2018-03-12 22:00] redzonex (Redzone): Then p2 can buy it t4 and it's like the old Scorch opening
